summary: Frontend testing of SPET application after global spacing standardization. All 18 features tested successfully - Owner module (24 pages), Manager module (17 pages), and Pulse module (7 pages) render correctly with proper spacing. Theme toggle, sidebar navigation, and view toggles all work correctly.

design_issues.screen: Multiple pages with tables (FinancialOverview, VenueComparison, CustomerIntelligence)
issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting: <th>/<td>/<tr> cannot be child of <span>. This is caused by framer-motion wrapping table elements. Not blocking but should be fixed for cleaner HTML. (Known issue from iteration_74)
Console warnings about chart dimensions being -1. This is a Recharts issue when charts render before container has dimensions. Not blocking functionality. (Known issue from iteration_74)

critical_code_review_comments: Spacing standardization applied correctly across all modules
Card-to-card gaps use space-y-4 as per design system
Section spacing uses mb-6 as per design system
Card padding uses p-5 as per design system
Column grids use gap-6 as per design system
All pages render without blank screens or errors
seed_data_creation: All data is mock/static from ownerData.js, managerData.js, managerModuleData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Global spacing standardization verified. All modules tested: Owner (24 pages), Manager (17 pages), Pulse (7 pages). Known console warnings for Recharts dimensions and framer-motion table nesting persist but are non-blocking.

1_owner_overview.details: Page renders at /owner with KPIs, Venue Performance, Retention & Loyalty, AI Business Overview, Top Customers, Smart Insights sections

2_owner_venues.details: Page renders at /owner/system/venues with correct card layout and venue cards

3_owner_nights_events_toggle.details: Toggle works at /owner/system/venues - switches between Venues and Nights/Events views

4_owner_smart_insights.details: Page renders at /owner/insights/smart with category filter (all, critical, attention, opportunity, growth)

5_owner_action_center.details: Page renders at /owner/insights/actions with status filter (All, Todo, In Progress, Done)

6_owner_revenue_analytics.details: Page renders at /owner/performance/revenue with KPIs and charts

7_owner_financial_overview.details: Page renders at /owner/finance/overview with P&L chart and monthly breakdown

8_owner_cost_analysis.details: Page renders at /owner/finance/costs with cost breakdown

9_owner_risk_alerts.details: Page renders at /owner/finance/risk with alert cards

10_owner_segments.details: Page renders at /owner/customers/segments with segment content

11_owner_campaign_performance.details: Page renders at /owner/growth/campaigns with campaign cards

12_manager_overview.details: Page renders at /manager with Smart Insights hero, Quick Stats, Top Performance, Revenue chart

13_manager_settings.details: Page renders at /manager/settings with General and Integrations sections

14_pulse_entry.details: Page renders at /pulse/entry with NFC scan input, Manual Entry button, KPIs, Guests Today list

15_pulse_inside.details: Page renders at /pulse/inside with Live Floor title, KPIs, guest cards grid

16_pulse_rewards.details: Page renders at /pulse/rewards with Points Engine, Tiers grid, Available Rewards list

17_sidebar_navigation.details: Sidebar navigation works correctly in Owner module - expandable groups, nav links, collapse toggle

18_theme_toggle.details: Theme toggle works in Owner module - switches between light and dark themes
